description: A candid overhead photograph (no graphic design, text overlay, or seal) looking down into an opened cardboard care-package box packed full of donated snacks and drinks: a black Celsius energy-drink carton, numerous individually wrapped candies, peanuts/trail mix in zip bags, granola and snack bars, and assorted colorful packaged treats. This is the companion documentary image to the same ICE tweet about a patriotic family in Omaha delivering a care package to officers in Minneapolis. It is a plain photo of the package contents with no on-image text. Intent: evidence of grassroots public support for ICE officers, humanizing the agency. Target audience: ICE personnel and sympathetic public.
